---
title: "PhyloAnnotator Workflow"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{PhyloAnnotator Workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

## Overview

PhyloAnnotator workflows start with a Newick tree, a metadata table, and a YAML
file describing annotation tracks.

```{r, eval = FALSE}
library(PhyloAnnotator)
atlas_generate_examples("example")
atlas_run("example/config.yaml", output_dir = "atlas-output")
```

## Validation

```{r, eval = FALSE}
metadata <- atlas_read_metadata("example/metadata.csv")
validation <- atlas_validate(metadata, "example/tree.nwk")
validation
```

## Export

```{r, eval = FALSE}
dataset <- itol_colorstrip(metadata, "Country")
itol_write(dataset, "country-colorstrip.txt")
```
